tasks.title: Fix RWKV-TS model performance
tasks.description: RWKV-TS model is currently achieving only 29% accuracy, needs immediate diagnosis and fix to reach 50-60% target

subtasks.title: Performance analysis and metric collection
subtasks.description: Analyze current RWKV-TS model performance metrics, collect detailed training/validation statistics, and identify performance bottlenecks
subtasks.details: Run comprehensive performance analysis on the current RWKV-TS model implementation. Collect training loss curves, validation accuracy trends, confusion matrices, and per-class performance metrics. Analyze gradient flow, learning rate effectiveness, and convergence patterns. Document current 29% accuracy baseline and identify specific failure modes or data patterns causing poor performance.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate metrics collection by comparing against known baseline results and ensuring all performance indicators are captured accurately

subtasks.title: Model architecture review and hyperparameter tuning
subtasks.description: Review RWKV-TS architecture configuration and systematically tune hyperparameters to optimize model performance
subtasks.details: Examine the 655K parameter RWKV-TS architecture for potential improvements. Review layer configurations, attention mechanisms, and token mixing strategies. Systematically tune critical hyperparameters including learning rate, batch size, sequence length, embedding dimensions, and regularization parameters. Compare against RWKV best practices and research papers for optimal configurations.
subtasks.testStrategy: Use grid search or Bayesian optimization to validate hyperparameter improvements, with cross-validation to ensure robust performance gains

subtasks.title: Training loop debugging and data pipeline validation
subtasks.description: Debug training loop implementation and validate data preprocessing pipeline for correctness and efficiency
subtasks.details: Thoroughly debug the training loop for issues like gradient accumulation, optimizer state management, and learning rate scheduling. Validate data preprocessing pipeline including tokenization, sequence padding, and batch construction. Check for data leakage, incorrect labels, or preprocessing artifacts that could impact model learning. Ensure proper train/validation splits and data augmentation if applicable.
subtasks.testStrategy: Implement unit tests for data pipeline components and validate training loop with simplified datasets to isolate potential issues

subtasks.title: Implementation of performance improvements and validation
subtasks.description: Apply identified fixes and improvements to achieve 50-60% target accuracy with comprehensive validation
subtasks.details: Implement the most promising improvements identified from architecture review and training debugging. This may include hyperparameter adjustments, architecture modifications, training procedure fixes, or data pipeline improvements. Retrain the model with optimized configuration and validate that accuracy reaches the 50-60% target range. Document all changes and their impact on performance.
subtasks.testStrategy: Conduct multiple training runs to ensure consistent performance improvements, with statistical significance testing to validate the 50-60% accuracy target is reliably achieved

tasks.title: Complete stack ensemble implementation
tasks.description: Add missing CNN-Trans OOF predictions to complete the 2-class stacking ensemble

tasks.title: Implement feature normalization
tasks.description: Add StandardScaler to normalize features for all models to improve convergence

tasks.title: Add focal loss for class imbalance
tasks.description: Implement focal loss with γ=2.0 and class weights [1.0, 1.3] to address class imbalance issues

tasks.title: Implement multi-scale feature engineering
tasks.description: Create engineer_multiscale_features() that extracts 21 features across 3 scales: pattern-level (5), context (10), and relative position (5), plus adaptive Williams %R. Expected improvement: 54.78% → 60-65%

tasks.title: Test task for MCP verification
tasks.description: Quick test to verify GLM API is working through MCP

tasks.title: Remove Bespoke integration from Moola
tasks.description: Clean up and remove the Bespoke backend/frontend integration from Moola project. The candlesticks symlinked directory is now the primary annotation/meta system going forward.

subtasks.title: Remove Bespoke backend and frontend directories
subtasks.description: Delete the bespoke_backend/ and bespoke_frontend/ directories and all their contents from the project root
subtasks.details: Use rm -rf to completely remove the bespoke_backend/ and bespoke_frontend/ directories. Check git status to ensure these are untracked files that can be safely deleted without affecting version control.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify directories are completely removed and project still functions correctly

subtasks.title: Remove Bespoke-related scripts and files
subtasks.description: Delete all Bespoke integration scripts, configuration files, and documentation from the scripts/ directory and project root
subtasks.details: Remove scripts/export_for_bespoke.py, scripts/run_bespoke_interface.py, start_bespoke.sh, and BESPOKE_INTEGRATION_GUIDE.md. Check for any other Bespoke references in configuration files or documentation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Search codebase for any remaining 'bespoke' references to ensure complete removal

subtasks.title: Update code references and imports
subtasks.description: Remove any remaining code references, imports, or configurations that point to the removed Bespoke integration components
subtasks.details: Search through Python files for any imports or references to bespoke modules. Update any CLI commands or configuration that might reference Bespoke functionality. Ensure the candlesticks system is properly configured as the primary annotation system.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run the main application and verify no import errors or missing module exceptions related to Bespoke components

tasks.title: Commit current state before Bespoke removal
tasks.description: Create a git commit to capture the current state of the codebase before removing Bespoke integration. This establishes a clear baseline for tracking what gets removed.

tasks.title: Deep codebase cleanup - remove legacy and unused files
tasks.description: Comprehensive audit and removal of unused test files, outdated scripts, legacy code, broken implementations, heavy markdown documentation in root, and any other files adding token weight without value. Streamline the codebase to essential working components only for ensemble model operations.

tasks.title: Enforce modern Python standards and hooks
tasks.description: Audit codebase for outdated Python patterns, ensure all hooks are properly called, validate ensemble model implementations follow correct data handling and methods. Enforce modern Python best practices throughout.

tasks.title: Prepare for cleanlab corrections integration
tasks.description: Set up infrastructure for receiving and integrating cleanlab corrections data. Ensure data pipeline is ready for SMOT and other correction techniques to feed into the ensemble system.

tasks.title: Mid-level directory cleanup and legacy code removal
tasks.description: Comprehensive audit of mid-level directories (configs/, data/, docker/, docs/, examples/, hooks/, moola/, reports/, scripts/, src/) to remove legacy code, outdated configurations, and unused files that could interfere with current ensemble models and training pipelines. Preserve only essential working components for current model training infrastructure.
